title: Review: db.rs as-u64 casts + 8 commits
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — the as-u64 casts are a missed application of an established project convention. In a corrupted DB the sync guard bypass (scan_tip) is the worst case. Normal operation is unaffected since set_scan_tip uses try_from and values written are always non-negative.
Confidence: 93% chance of no missed bug. The tx_builder convergence logic and anchor-mismatch pre-check are correct. The primary uncertainty is now cleared: the as-u64 casts are the only pattern I know was missed.
